description: Browsable explorer for Claude Skills across the Trollefsen household. Walks every skill dir on the VPS (~/.claude/skills, shared/skills, per-agent dirs) AND parses session JSONL transcripts to surface real usage data — invocations per agent, last-used timestamps, per-agent skill matrix. Not a static gallery; a living picture of what's actually running.
features: Filesystem scan of 39 skills across 7 dirs (user, shared, 5 agent dirs)
JSONL parser extracts real invocation data from session transcripts (1800+ recorded invocations across the household)
Card grid with per-skill usage badges — total invocations, last-used relative time, who used it
Agent matrix view — agents × skills, color-coded by ownership (own / shared / absent), with per-agent invocation counts
Full-text search across SKILL.md content (name + description + body)
Filter by owner (user/shared/agent) and by which agent uses it
SKILL.md preview modal with full markdown rendering
Copy-as-prompt button — exports skill name + description + full SKILL.md as a Claude-ready prompt
Dark terminal aesthetic with agent-colored borders (Wilson cyan, Eve orange, Pepper pink, Radar purple, C-3PO yellow)
Build-time data extraction — zero runtime queries, fully static export
